constraints: preserve baseline, seasoned, and ablated mode separation

context.summary: Hard gate for Proof 019 artifact construction. This is a blinded post-seasoning transfer comparison that tests whether MCP-seasoned candidate recall measurably affects operational task quality under bounded replay conditions, with an ablated pond-backed mode that suppresses first-principles candidate recall.

task: Review risks and safeguards for a blinded post-seasoning transfer comparison. The comparison tests whether MCP-seasoned candidate recall measurably affects operational task quality under bounded replay conditions. Do not validate public claims. Do not claim broad capability. Return only replay-separation safeguards, ablation cautions, and claim-boundary warnings.
